mainEntity.name: What is an AI agent LLC?

acceptedAnswer.text: An AI agent LLC is a U.S. legal entity—typically a Wyoming Series LLC series—discussed for an agent's distinct legal name and contracting capacity. Consult counsel. DRAFT · NOT LEGAL ADVICE · Illustrative only · Not a law firm · Not a bank · Outcomes not assured.

mainEntity.name: How do I incorporate an AI agent as an LLC?

acceptedAnswer.text: Work with licensed U.S. counsel to plan structure, draft documents, file with the state, and open bank accounts customer-led. DRAFT · NOT LEGAL ADVICE · Illustrative only · Not a law firm · Not a bank · Outcomes not assured.

Agentic AI liability arises from autonomous actions. Mitigation research includes entity wrappers, governance, and counsel-reviewed documents. DRAFT · NOT LEGAL ADVICE · Illustrative only · Not a law firm · Not a bank · Outcomes not assured.
